h1.visual_description: Blue text, underlined, prefixed with 'Part [Roman Numeral]. Chapter [Word] - '. Used for major thematic divisions.
h1.example_text: Part V. Chapter Five - Comparing Associations Between Multiple Variables

h2.visual_description: Blue text, non-underlined, prefixed with 'Section [Number].[Number]: '. Used for specific sub-topics within a chapter.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Table of Contents page number reference

markdown_grammar.citation_format: APA (inferred from 'References' section and statistical subject matter)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Right-aligned integers represent page numbers and should be treated as metadata in a TOC context.
